item.title: C Programming Language
item.description: Haven’t figured out how git submodules work yet, but as soon as I do check out my repo with the book’s exercises Sources C Programming: A Modern Approach Second Edition by K. N. King Chapter 2: C Fundamentals Chapter 2.1: A Bad Pun program #include <stdio.h> int main(void) { printf("To C, or not to C: that is the question.\n"); return 0; } Compiling and linking ❗️ I have an M2 MacBook, and I use gcc to compile c code

item.title: Linear Algebra
item.description: Link to pdf file My notebook.pdf for this course Course Description

item.title: About me
item.description: KaTeX Integration test $$x = {-b \pm \sqrt{b^2-4ac} \over 2a}$$ $$ \sum_{i=1}^n n = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}$$ Hello! :D My name is Brandon Jose Tenorio Noguera (pronounced NO-GHE-RA). I’m a first-generation university student pursuing a degree in Computer Science at the University of Maryland, Baltimore County (UMBC) Useful resources (Neo)Vim https://vim.rtorr.com/ https://www.ejmastnak.com/tutorials/vim-latex/intro/ Front end https://www.realtimecolors.com/ https://www.fontpair.co/ https://app.haikei.app/ https://omatsuri.app/ https://gradient.style/ https://icones.js.org/ https://www.joshwcomeau.com/shadow-palette/ https://realfavicongenerator.net/
